title: Graphs, Representations, and Traversal
description: Model service dependencies, social links, and routes without losing direction or weight. Learners cumulatively produce a graph library with BFS and DFS traces through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Define vertices, edges, direction, weights, self-loops, and parallel-edge policy from the domain.
Choose adjacency lists, matrices, edge lists, or implicit neighbors from density and operations.
Maintain BFS frontier and discovery invariants for unweighted shortest paths and layers.
